method: A new model architecture DeBERTa (Decoding-enhanced BERT with disentangled attention) that improves the BERT and RoBERTa models.

Disentangled attention mechanism: each word is represented using two vectors encoding its content and position, respectively; attention weights are computed using disentangled matrices on contents and relative positions.

Enhanced mask decoder: incorporates absolute positions in the decoding layer to predict masked tokens during model pre-training, by using absolute word position embeddings right before the softmax layer.
A new virtual adversarial training method used for fine-tuning to improve models’ generalization.
